untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of 'candle height divided by breakout price percentage compared to median' — this requires dynamic statistical computation (median calculation per candle type) and a custom derived metric not available in the allowed indicator set. The concept of 'tall vs short candles' relative to a rolling median of height/breakout ratios cannot be expressed using only the provided indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Bar Props). A workaround using 'range > sma_20' approximates tall candles but does not capture the precise median-relative logic.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Used 'range > sma_20' as a proxy for tall candles, but this is NOT equivalent to the original rule. The original signal requires: (1) calculation of median candle height for each candle type, (2) per-candle ratio of height to breakout price, (3) comparison of individual candle ratio to that median. This multi-step statistical requirement exceeds the capability of the allowed indicator set and requires custom feature engineering or a dedicated candle-classification engine.
